title: Fulfillment Destination Filter
description: A specific destination, named by value or by reference: a coarse locality (`address_country` / `address_region` / `postal_code`), or a `location` id. Platforms SHOULD provide one or the other, not both; if both are present, a business SHOULD use the more specific — typically `location`.

location.description: A reference to the destination (e.g. store, pickup location, saved address).
